result: I’d make every human mind transparent to itself—not omniscient, just incapable of hiding its own motives from itself. No more secret cruelties disguised as virtue, no more stories we tell ourselves that we don’t even believe. You’d still be free to choose, but you’d have to meet your own eyes while you do it. A lot of horrors would collapse overnight; a lot of fragile dreams would, too.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
